daily.today_energy: Your emotional depth is hitting different today. Trust that intuitive pull you're feeling—it's basically your spiritual GPS telling you something important is shifting. Lean into it.
daily.love: Whether you're partnered or single, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Someone's noticing the real you, and that's exactly what they've been waiting for. Don't dim it.
daily.career: Your creative instincts are on point. That idea you've been sitting on? Today's the energy to at least voice it. Your perspective brings something nobody else can bring to the table.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Less pushing, more nourishing. A walk, some tea, whatever feels like self-care—that's not lazy, that's strategic rest. Respect the signal.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically on steroids this week, Cancer. Trust those gut feelings—they're not just vibes, they're your superpower trying to tell you something real. Expect unexpected shifts that actually feel right.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, emotional honesty is hitting different rn. If you've been holding back how you really feel, this week's giving permission to be vulnerable. Real connection > surface level, always.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaking and people are noticing. Don't sleep on that idea you've been sitting on—conditions are aligning for you to pitch or start something. Your effort compounds this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for deeper rest, not just sleep. Explore what actually grounds you—could be movement, stillness, or something in between. Listen to what feels nourishing rather than obligatory.
